title: RogueCraft Plus
description: An addon to the RogueCraft datapack! Adds new abilities, structures and a boss!
body:
![RogueCraft Plus Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7e2c71c7811e929c6b7ae3da4dafeccc54295e7.png)

RogueCraft Plus aims to add onto the already fun experience of the RogueCraft datapack. As of right now the pack adds an extra boss fight (The Copper Golem) that naturally generates and 2 new abilities, a Fan Of Blades ability and a Sonic Boom Bow to the shop. 

# Silent Showcase Video

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zszgc0M3MbM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

##  This pack requires the Resource Pack along with [RogueCraft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rogue-craft) to function.

RogueCraft Modrinth Page: [RogueCraft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rogue-craft)

The *first* version of the datapack within the name is the version matching RogueCraft, while the second one is the version of the pack itself.

# INSTALLATION

Please make sure that RogueCraft Plus is **ABOVE** RogueCraft for it to properly work! Like this:
![Installation order for RogueCraft Plus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fba195068512a6a82a03cdf23b737b32b0479d4_0.webp)

### To show it works with RogueCraft and its rewards, here are some screenshots to show:

![RogueCraft Copper Golem Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e195356851864191ba23ea2b496881662bac94e.png)

![RogueCraft Copper Golem Skillpoints](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c018680ec6d0cb32c049e28ef43cba514c93dbc2.png)

**_The Abilities in the Shop_**
![RogueCraft Plus Abilities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52e150b02a71847c0545544eab3aadfbd1eccb52_0.webp)

**_Here is an image showing the structure to find_**

![RogueCraft Plus Copper Golem Structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11fd8986f1b1a508c88753e8d98eab1cab73259c_0.webp)

This spawns in desert biomes, and the boss rewards you 14 obsidian allowing for quick access to the Nether while speedrunning allowing for a different route in the run.

### Whats to come?

I am currently working on adding new custom Abilities that can also be bought with Skillpoints and equipped for runs. Next update will require a resource pack to work.
